t_ch: 看起来没有向下的路。
t_en: Doesn't look like there's a way down.

t_ch: 不然怎么能说是捷径呢？
t_en: I wouldn't call it a shortcut if there was.

t_ch: 二位虽然不能像忆者一样直接穿过物理结构，但我想到一个好办法，能让你们安全无虞地抵达这个房间的正下层。
t_en: You two may not be able to phase through physical structures like Memokeepers, but I've got a great idea that will help you safely reach the floor right below this room.

t_ch: 是不是要教我穿墙了？
t_en: Are you going to teach me to phase through walls now?

t_ch: 二位虽然不能像忆者一样直接穿过物理结构，但我想到一个好办法，能让你们安全无虞地抵达这个房间的正下层。
t_en: You two may not be able to phase through physical structures like Memokeepers, but I've got a great idea that will help you safely reach the floor right below this room.

t_ch: 很简单，看见这盏大吊灯了吗？接下来…我们要制造一些符合常识的*小动静*。
t_en: It's really easy — see this chandelier? Next... we want to create some reasonably *small movements*.

t_ch: 这样就不会有人打扰了。来——我可以为你们表演一个小魔术。
t_en: No one will disturb us now. Here, how about I show you a little magic trick?

t_ch: 准备好了吗？小心别发出惊呼哦。
t_en: Are you ready? Don't be too surprised.

t_ch: 这是…流萤？
t_en: Is that... Firefly?

t_ch: 没错。是这个房间留下的，有关她的记忆。地面的轻微震动，屏幕中闪过的倒影，忆质的流向…我将它们汇聚，以片段形式复现了出来。
t_en: Yes. It's what this room left behind — the memories of her. The slight trembling of the ground, the fleeting reflections on the screen, the flow of memoria... I gathered and reproduced them in fragments.

t_ch: 至于上下文…就需要我们稍作整理了。快去吧，进行这种规模的记忆复现，对我的消耗也是很大的。
t_en: As for the context... we'll need to sort that out a bit. Hurry along now. Recreating memories on this scale takes quite a toll on me.

t_ch: 如果，能再来一次……
t_en: If I could try again...

t_ch: 她盯着这些屏幕，是在照镜子吗…「再来一次」是什么意思？
t_en: She stares at the screens. Is she looking at herself in the mirror? ...What does she mean by "try again"?

t_ch: 冷静，流萤…冷静一点……
t_en: Calm down, Firefly... Stay calm...

t_ch: 她看起来…很紧张。
t_en: She seems... very nervous.

t_ch: 是啊。是什么让她这么紧张？
t_en: Yes. What is making her so nervous?

t_ch: 我们出发吧……
t_en: Let's get going...

t_ch: 「我们」？她身边还有其他人吗？
t_en: "Let's"? Is there someone else?

t_ch: 综合这些信息，流萤是和同行者——应该只有一位——一起进入了这条长廊。
t_en: With all this in mind, Firefly and her companion — there should only be one — have entered this corridor together.

t_ch: 当时和{NICKNAME}遇见的那个东西……
t_en: That thing I encountered with {NICKNAME} back then...

t_ch: 如果我没猜错…它一定和「钟表匠」有关。
t_en: If I'm not wrong... it has to do with the Watchmaker.

t_ch: 她提到了你的名字。
t_en: She mentioned your name.

t_ch: 在背后也这么称呼，看来你们的关系确实不错呀。
t_en: Thinking of you even in your absence, seems like you two were pretty close.

t_ch: 她似乎在和什么人分享自己的发现，而且…和「钟表匠」相关。
t_en: She seems to be sharing her discovery with someone, and... it's related to the Watchmaker.

t_ch: 她还不知道自己会成为受害者……
t_en: She has no idea that she'll become a victim...

t_ch: 情况开始变化了，似乎那位同行者…背离了原先的计划。
t_en: The situation has changed, and it seems that companion... has deviated from the original plan.

t_ch: 或者，从结果而言…这才是那个人真正的*计划*。
t_en: Perhaps, judging from the outcome... this is that person's true intention.

t_ch: 她被什么人逼迫着走了这边，而且……
t_en: Who forced her to go that way? And...

t_ch: 「机甲」…耐人寻味的说法。我记得猎犬家系在追捕这么一位罪犯——「身穿银色盔甲的高大男性」。
t_en: "Mecha"... What an intriguing statement. I recall the Bloodhound family is pursuing a criminal — "a tall male in silver armor."

t_ch: 门…打不开…这里是死路……
t_en: The door... It won't open... It's a dead end...

t_ch: 从这些只言片语推断，流萤的同行者中途背叛，把她一个人关在这个房间，而自己不知所踪…为什么？
t_en: Based on these fragmented pieces of information, it seems Firefly's companion betrayed her halfway and trapped her alone in this room, disappearing without a trace... But why?

t_ch: 她说过，这场交易和「钟表匠」有关——涉及钟表匠，就会触碰许多人的底线。
t_en: She mentioned that this transaction involves the Watchmaker, and that often means stepping on many people's toes.

t_ch: 也许是想要侵吞遗产，也许是为了让知情者再少一人，也许…是因为这片忆域中隐藏更深的*秘密*，而为了钓起大鱼…需要浮饵。
t_en: They might have had their eyes on the legacy, or wanted to silence another who knew too much. Or, there could be a deeper secret tucked away in this Memory Zone, and to hook that elusive prize... one needs the right bait.

t_ch: 你的意思是…流萤？
t_en: Do you mean... Firefly?

t_ch: 这只是一种最坏的假设。但不妨想想，如果这一切的始作俑者就在附近，他为何会放任我们四处搜查？除非……
t_en: This is just the worst-case scenario. But think about it: If the mastermind behind all this is nearby, why would he let us look around freely? Unless...

t_ch: 除非他还有更在意的事，需要——或者说，正在确认。
t_en: ...there is something else he cares more about and needs — or should I say, is verifying.

t_ch: 变幻莫测的通路，指向游荡的忆域迷因…她完全迷失在忆域中了。
t_en: Unpredictable pathways pointing toward a wandering meme... She was completely lost in the Memory Zone.

t_ch: 可惜这条路，最终通向「死亡」的巢穴……
t_en: Unfortunately, this path ultimately leads one to the lair of "Death."

t_ch: 她以为逃出生天了，但……
t_en: She thought she had escaped but...

t_ch: 辛苦你了，忆者——非常精彩的驱虎吞狼。
t_en: Thank you for your efforts, Memokeeper - quite a brilliant move to pit enemies against each other.

t_ch: 乍看到游侠和猎手齐聚一堂的时候，我可是心里一紧哪…没想到你能成功挑起他们之间的斗争。
t_en: When I first saw the Ranger and the Hunter together, my heart skipped a beat... I never thought you'd successfully trigger a conflict between the two.

t_ch: 按照约定，我把这孩子带到你面前了。交易完成。
t_en: As promised, I've delivered the child to you. Our transaction is complete.

t_ch: 这是什么情况…
t_en: What is happening...

t_ch: 你们是一伙的…
t_en: You two are in this together...

t_ch: 黑天鹅，你…
t_en: Black Swan, you...

t_ch: 哈哈，看来我们的无名客朋友还没搞清楚状况。没事，我来为你解释一下。
t_en: Haha, looks like our Nameless friend over here is still confused. Let me explain.

t_ch: 总的来说，朋友，你得谢谢这位小姐。她非但没有算计你——恰恰相反，她救了你……
t_en: In short, you need to thank this lady here, my friend. Not only did she not betray you — on the contrary, she rescued you...

t_ch: …从那位「巡海游侠」的手中。
t_en: ...from that "Galaxy Ranger."

t_ch: （黄泉是某位星神的令使？砂金的话，真的可信吗……）
t_en: (Acheron is the Emanator of a particular Aeon? Can I really believe Aventurine...?)

t_ch: （但他也给了我选择…也许我得再和黑天鹅聊聊。）
t_en: (But he gave me a choice... Maybe I should talk to Black Swan again.)

t_ch: 呀…表情像是受伤的小动物呢。你还肯和我谈谈吗？我依旧愿意…当你的心理治疗师。
t_en: My, my... you look like a small injured animal. Are you still willing to talk to me? Of course... I'm still willing to be your psychotherapist.

t_ch: 你欺骗了我？
t_en: You betrayed me?

t_ch: 我承认和那位先生做了交易，把你带到他的身边。但…这里同样是安全的地方。
t_en: I admit I'd made a transaction with that gentleman to bring you before him. But... this is also a safe place.

t_ch: 他需要你，这是收复匹诺康尼必需的一环，而我认为他有潜力，也能助我收获独一无二的记忆，便答应了合作。
t_en: He needs you. It's essential if we want to reclaim Penacony. Recognizing his immense potential and the invaluable memories he can help me gather, I opted to join forces with him.

t_ch: 在匹诺康尼，所有人都可能说谎，当然…也包括我，这点我无可辩驳，也不会奢求原谅。
t_en: In Penacony, everyone may be lying, and yes... that includes me. I can't deny this, nor do I seek forgiveness.

t_ch: 但，还记得吗？我也说过…「我相信你们的潜质」，这句话绝无半点虚假。
t_en: But do you still remember? I said... "I have faith in your potential," and that's not a lie.

t_ch: 忆庭想见证星穹列车开拓银河的未来，而我会将这些回忆一一珍藏。所以我没有伤害各位的理由，反而会继续帮助你们——前提是你们还愿意。
t_en: The Garden of Recollection wants to witness the future of the Astral Express Trailblazing the cosmos, and as for these memories — I will treasure them. I do not have reasons to hurt any of you. Instead, I will continue to assist you — provided you are willing to accept my assistance.

t_ch: 砂金值得信任吗？
t_en: Can I trust Aventurine?

t_ch: 我的看法或许会出乎你的意料。
t_en: My take on this might surprise you.

t_ch: 在我看来，他是个值得信任的人，不为别的，只因他是个优秀的商人。在这茫茫寰宇中，没有人比商人更注重诚信和契约。
t_en: In my view, he's a trustworthy individual. Not for any other reason, but because he's an exceptional businessman. In this vast universe, no one values honesty and contracts more than a merchant.

t_ch: 但你也要当心，尤其在与他们订立契约时，要多加留意。在契约之外，他们不会考虑你的权利…为了最大化自己的利益，他们可以无所不用其极。
t_en: But, always be on guard, particularly when making agreements with him. Scrutinize the details. Beyond the confines of the contract, your rights are off his radar... He'll go to extreme lengths to ensure his advantage.

t_ch: 你觉得幕后黑手是谁…
t_en: Who do you think is the mastermind...?

t_ch: 我依旧认为流萤小姐的事…如我们推测的那般，和星核猎手关联更甚。但你也听到了，砂金指控了那位游侠。
t_en: I still believe that Miss Firefly's situation... is deeply connected with the Stellaron Hunter, just as we speculated. But as you've heard, Aventurine has his finger pointed at the Galaxy Ranger.

t_ch: 虽然不知他为何会作出这种判断，但他有公司的情报网，看法值得深入讨论。以及，我也认为黄泉小姐有所隐瞒……
t_en: I can't fathom why he'd draw that conclusion, but given his access to the IPC's intelligence network, we should seriously consider his perspective. Moreover, I believe Miss Acheron is also hiding something.

t_ch: …不，应该说，隐瞒了全部的事。
t_en: ...No, in fact, I should say, she's hiding everything from us.

t_ch: 这是在此前的一次邂逅中，我意外得到的收获。关于泯灭帮…我也能证明砂金所说确有其事。
t_en: It was an unexpected finding from an earlier encounter. With regards to the Annihilation Gang... I can also prove that what Aventurine said was the truth.

t_ch: 也因此，在这场金色的宴会中…她是我最关注的舞者。
t_en: That's why, during this golden soirée... she is the dance's centerpiece.

t_ch: 你愿意帮我走出这片忆域吗？
t_en: Are you willing to bring me out of this Memory Zone?

t_ch: 我非常愿意，但现在还不是时候。
t_en: Why of course, but now's not the time.

t_ch: 我知道你很疑惑，也很…悲伤。无论那女孩是谁，一个活生生的人，一段不应结束的「记忆」…就这样被抹去了，仿佛溶解在水中的泡沫，烟消云散……
t_en: I know you're confused and... sad. Whoever that girl might have been, a living soul, a "memory" that was meant to last... she simply vanished, like the dissolution of bubbles in water, disappearing in an instant...

t_ch: 无论如何，我希望你信任砂金——或者更多地——信任我，去看看他口中的<color=#dbc291ff>「事实」</color>。这能带领我们走向匹诺康尼背后更深的秘密。
t_en: No matter what, I hope you can trust Aventurine — or rather — trust me and see the <color=#dbc291ff>"truth"</color> with your own eyes. This can lead us deeper into the secrets behind Penacony.

t_ch: 我会保护你。等从他手中获取了更多信息，我再护送你回到同伴身边也不迟。
t_en: I will protect you. Once I gather more information from him, I'll make sure you're safely returned to your companions.

t_ch: 而为了真相，以及制止更多无谓的牺牲…这是最正确的选择。
t_en: For the truth and to prevent more unnecessary sacrifices... It is the right choice.

t_ch: 你说得对，我们走吧。
t_en: You're right. Let's go.

t_ch: 我怎么知道你们不是想陷害我？
t_en: How would I know you're not trying to frame me?

t_ch: 他或许有这个打算，但我不会。
t_en: Perhaps he plans on doing so, but I won't.

t_ch: 忆庭的视线无处不在。如果他想对你动手，就得做好与忆者为敌的准备——这点我已经提醒过他了。
t_en: The Garden of Recollection has eyes everywhere. If he wants to hurt you, he'll have to fight against the Memokeepers — I've warned him about that.

t_ch: 接下来，我会以模因形式陪伴在你身边，以备不时之需。出发吧，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Later, I'll stay by your side as a memetic entity, just in case. Time to set off, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 很好，我就知道你一定会来。对了，那位忆者…算了，我不多问了。
t_en: Excellent, I knew you would come. By the way, about that Memokeeper... Never mind, I won't press the issue further.

t_ch: 毕竟我说过，你可以和同伴商量，也可以反过来利用我，我很欢迎！因为这也是在向我展示你们的价值。
t_en: I've said before, you can liaise with your companions, or even twist the narrative against me. I'll wholeheartedly embrace it! It signifies your potential.

t_ch: 我从不做赔本买卖的，希望各位「朋友」…别让我失望。
t_en: I don't do deals where I'm on the losing end. So, my "friends"... don't let me down.

t_ch: 来吧——这边请！
t_en: Please, this way if you will!

t_ch: 这个方向…你还是要走吗？这可是千载难逢的机会，离开这里…也就意味着离开真相。
t_en: Are you still... continuing down this path? This is a rare opportunity. Leaving here... will also mean leaving the truth.

t_ch: 你说得对，不能离开。
t_en: You're right. I can't leave.

t_ch: 嗯，还是考虑一下砂金的提议吧。
t_en: Yes, I better think about Aventurine's proposal.

t_ch: 我已决定，离开这里。
t_en: I've decided. I'm leaving this place.

t_ch: 这样啊…嗯，我尊重你的选择。我们走吧，回现实去。
t_en: I see... Fine, I respect your choice. Let's return to reality.

t_ch: 思考再三，你拒绝了砂金的邀请。这次他没再挽留，只是看着你离开了那片忆域。
t_en: After careful consideration, you decline Aventurine's invitation. This time, he simply watches as you depart from the Memory Zone without asking you to stay.

t_ch: 你回到现实，与同伴们会合。经过慎重讨论，星穹列车决定对匹诺康尼出手相助。在你们和家族的共同努力下，真相很快水落石出：一切都是公司的阴谋。
t_en: Returning to reality, you reunite with your companions. After a thorough discussion, the Crew decides to assist Penacony, leading to the revelation of a conspiracy orchestrated by the IPC.

t_ch: 不怀好意的人们被一一驱逐，谐乐大典也平安到来。你们被奉为上上之宾，在歌剧院中央聆听这颗盛会之星的笑声。那些欢呼被夹杂在碰杯的苏乐达与歌舞的人群间，如此清晰——
t_en: With the expulsion of all ill-intentioned visitors, the Charmony Festival proceeds smoothly. As honored guests, you partake in the joyous atmosphere, filled with laughter, clinking glasses full of SoulGlad, and the exuberant singing and dancing of the crowd...

t_ch: 「愿时光永驻今夜，愿我们永不醒来！」
t_en: "May this moment last forever, and may we never awaken from this euphoric dream!"

t_ch: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》
t_en: Honkai: Star Rail

t_ch: 我们到了，就在这扇门后。屏住呼吸，拭目以待吧——
t_en: This is it, just beyond this door. Take a deep breath and get ready.

t_ch: （进入房间。）
t_en: (Enter the room.)

t_ch: 哦，我可算想起来了…朋友！那之后，咱们玩了场愉快的游戏。
t_en: Oh, I remember... my friend! After that, we played an enjoyable game.

t_ch: 看，此时此刻，恰如彼时彼刻…不是么？
t_en: Tell me, doesn't this feel eerily familiar?

t_ch: 我完全想起来啦，那个时候，我是这么对你说的——
t_en: I remember everything now. This was what I told you at that time...

t_ch: 领衔主演\n{NICKNAME}
t_en: Lead Actors\n{NICKNAME}

t_ch: 特别鸣谢\n知更鸟\n星期日
t_en: Special Thanks\nRobin\nSunday

t_ch: 剧本指导\n艾利欧
t_en: Script Supervisor\nElio

t_ch: 砂金不在这个方向，你知道，他也清楚。你还可以选择回头，去看看他口中的事实是什么。但如果继续向前，就意味着「拒绝」。
t_en: Aventurine isn't here. You know that, and so does he. You can also choose to turn around and find out what the facts are directly from his mouth, but if you insist on going forward, that signals a "rejection."

t_ch: 直接离开。
t_en: Leave directly.

t_ch: 还是回去找砂金吧…
t_en: Let's go back and find Aventurine...

t_ch: 暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成开拓任务「是谁杀死了…」
t_en: Unable to leave the current area. Please complete Trailblaze Mission "Whodunit"

t_ch: 还记得先前是怎样教你的吗？感受忆质的流向，走上墙面，然后…靠近它。
t_en: Still remember what I taught you? Feel the flow of the memoria, walk up the wall, and then... get close to it.

t_ch: 看，一根孤零零的链条——和它打个招呼吧。
t_en: Look, a solitary chain. Go say hello to it.

t_ch: 她没有别的路可走，只能从侧廊离开。
t_en: She had no other way to leave but from the side corridor.

t_ch: 她以为逃出生天了，但……
t_en: She thought she had escaped but...

t_ch: 是星核猎手送了你们最后一程。
t_en: About the Stellaron Hunter who was behind your ultimate departure.

t_ch: 好可疑…哪有这么凑巧的事，那女人绝对有问题。
t_en: Hmm, suspicious... Could it really just be a coincidence? I've got a funny feeling about that lady.

t_ch: 但她确实找到了{NICKNAME}，并救了{M#他}{F#她}——眼下只能先听听对方的要求了……
t_en: But she did find {NICKNAME}, and save {M#him}{F#her} too. The least we could do is to listen to the other party's request...

t_ch: 那位忆者显然是有备而来，谨慎为好。
t_en: That Memokeeper obviously came here with an agenda. We should remain vigilant.

t_ch: （看来要忙一阵子了，不知流萤回现实了没有……）
t_en: (We'll be busy for a while. I wonder if Firefly's returned to reality yet...)

t_ch: （…不对，我没她的联系方式啊。问问黑天鹅吧……）
t_en: (...Hmm, I don't have her contact info, I'll ask Black Swan...)

t_ch: （三月的房间就在边上…先去和她汇合吧。）
t_en: (March's room is this way... I should go meet up with her.)

t_ch: 这些东倒西歪的小可怜……
t_en: These poor little things stumbling about...

t_ch: 奇怪，这里似乎还有别人的气息……
t_en: Strange, there appears to be someone else's presence here...

t_ch: 啊…是她？这怎么可能？
t_en: Ah... Her? How is this possible?

t_ch: 黄泉小姐，我有个提议——不如我们分头寻找出路，等有所发现再会合吧？这样效率更高一些。
t_en: Miss Acheron, I have a suggestion: Why not split up and look for a way out, and meet up again when we find something? That would speed things up.

t_ch: 但这里很危险，还是三人同行吧。
t_en: But it's dangerous around here. We'd better travel together.

t_ch: 如何，能感受到忆质在你身边流淌吗？
t_en: How about it? Can you feel the memoria flowing around you?

t_ch: 接下来，找个合适的位置…试着*走上*墙面吧。
t_en: Next, find a suitable spot... and try *walking up* the wall.

t_ch: …成功了。居然真的可以。
t_en: ...It worked. You really can walk up walls.

t_ch: 对于忆者，这种程度的忆域不过是孩子的游乐场。走吧，我们从正门离开。
t_en: A Memory Zone of this level is mere child's play to a Memokeeper. Come on. Let's head out through the front door.

t_ch: 这里…是死路吧。
t_en: This is... a dead end.

t_ch: 得心应手，不是么？{NICKNAME}，你很有「记忆」的天赋哦。
t_en: You're a natural, aren't you? You're a prodigy at Remembrance, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我们到了——这里有座电梯，和大堂的一模一样，乘坐它应该就能到目的地。
t_en: We've arrived. There's an elevator here, just like in the lobby. We should be able to reach our destination with it.

t_ch: 但前方的忆域…似乎被严重扭曲了。各位，小心为好。
t_en: But the Memory Zone up ahead... appears to be severely twisted. Be careful, everyone.

t_ch: …看，我就说没那么简单。这是哪儿？
t_en: ...See, I told you it wasn't going to be that simple. Where is this?

t_ch: 快走，穿过这里。
t_en: Hurry, through here.

t_ch: …我们走吧。
t_en: ...Let's go.

t_ch: 不是那儿，回来。
t_en: Not there. Come back.

t_ch: 这个方向——请跟我来。
t_en: This way, follow me.

t_ch: …怎么回事？忆质中突然出现了少许…燥热？
t_en: ...What's going on? Why is it... getting hot in the memoria?

t_ch: 你也发现了。像是有什么东西烧起来了……
t_en: You've noticed it too. Like something is burning...

t_ch: 二位，走这边。我尽量为你们创造平稳的捷径。
t_en: You two, this way. I'll try to create a stable shortcut for you.

t_ch: 看…离开大堂，结构就变得紊乱了。穿过那条走廊——小心，别惊动了迷因。
t_en: Look... Upon leaving the lobby, the structure has become chaotic. Phase through that corridor, and be careful — do not alert the meme.

t_ch: 你怎么…？！这和说好的不一样……
t_en: Why did you...!? This isn't what we agreed on...

t_ch: 机甲…？！为什么……
t_en: Mecha...!? Why...

t_ch: 门…打不开……
t_en: The door... It won't open...

t_ch: 这里竟然有路……
t_en: There's actually a path here...

t_ch: 变幻莫测的通路，指向游荡的忆域迷因…她完全迷失在忆域中了。
t_en: Unpredictable pathways pointing toward a wandering meme... She was completely lost in the Memory Zone.

t_ch: 是出口…沿着这边应该能离开……
t_en: It's an exit... Following this path should lead me out of this place...

t_ch: 可惜这条路，最终通向「死亡」的巢穴……
t_en: Unfortunately, this path ultimately leads one to the lair of "Death."

t_ch: 总算回到大堂了，这样就……
t_en: Finally back at the lobby. If that's the case...

t_ch: 然后，就是结局了……
t_en: After that, it's the end...

t_ch: 各位，那边——
t_en: Everyone, over there—

t_ch: 看来有人恭候多时了啊。终于打算走上台前了么……
t_en: It seems like someone has been awaiting us. Ready to step into the spotlight now?

t_ch: …「星核猎手」萨姆。
t_en: ...Stellaron Hunter: Sam.

t_ch: 侦探游戏结束了，你们不该出现在这里。
t_en: The detective game is over. You shouldn't be here.

t_ch: 我将…点燃大海。
t_en: I will... set the seas ablaze.

t_ch: 等回到现实，记得告诉所有人——
t_en: Once you're back in the real world, remember to tell everyone —

t_ch: 既然如此——
t_en: If that's the case—

t_ch: （去见砂金吧，或者…我还是可以选择拒绝……）
t_en: (Go and meet Aventurine, or... I could still choose not to help...)

t_ch: 诶对了，好像那之后我还说了什么…是什么来着？
t_en: Oh right, I remember mentioning something after that... What was it again?

t_ch: 啊…似曾相识的走廊，似曾相识的房间。还记得吗？我们上次见面，就是在这地方。
t_en: Ah... a familiar hallway, a familiar room. Do you remember? The last time we met was right here.

t_ch: 入梦
t_en: Dream.

t_ch: 输入银狼的代码
t_en: Enter Silver Wolf's code.

t_ch: 半部快要消散的手机躺在地上，残留着一条没有发出的消息…一张合照，照片上的两个人笑得很开心。
t_en: A half-faded cell phone lies on the floor, capturing an unsent message... with a snapshot of two people wearing smiles.

t_ch: （捡起来）
t_en: (You pick it up)

t_ch: 手机彻底消散了，化为梦泡消逝而去。
t_en: The cell phone has completely dissipated into a dream bubble.

t_ch: …哎呀，朋友，我目睹这场面的时候，表情比你好不了多少。
t_en: ...Ah, friend. My expression wasn't much better than yours when I first saw this.

t_ch: 你没看错，就是她，那位声名显赫的歌者「知更鸟」。
t_en: Your eyes aren't deceiving you — it's her, the famous singer Robin.

t_ch: 这…怎么可能？
t_en: But... how is that possible?

t_ch: 知更鸟竟然也…
t_en: Could Robin actually...

t_ch: 先向你声明，这事跟我无关，我只是个不幸撞进现场的倒霉蛋。家族可以作证，不信的话就找个猎犬家系的人打听打听吧，他们恨我，恨公司，所以绝不会说谎。
t_en: First of all, can I just say that this had nothing to do with me. I'm just an unlucky bystander here. The Family can testify for me. If you don't believe me, just ask anyone in the Bloodhound Family — they hate me, and they hate the IPC, so they'd never lie.

t_ch: 这里也不是案发地，我为你展现的是一段「记忆」——最简单的光锥呈现技术，忆庭授权，公司所有。
t_en: This is not where the crime happened. What I showed to you was a "memory" — the most basic Light Cone manifesting tech, authorized by the Garden of Recollection and owned by the IPC.

t_ch: 事到如今，你还觉得那位「巡海游侠」是局外人么？
t_en: Did you really think the Galaxy Ranger was an outsider this whole time?

t_ch: 匹诺康尼可是郑重承诺过：在家族编织的美梦中，每一位客人的安全都会得到保障。遇险者会被强制唤醒，平安地回到现实。
t_en: Penacony has made a solemn commitment to protect the safety of anyone inside a Family dream. Any person in distress will be forcibly awakened and safely returned to reality.

t_ch: 他们有什么底气这样言之凿凿？因为这承诺的背后是「同谐」的庇佑：家族的筑梦师们将思想连缀成一，构建起坚不可破的安全防线。
t_en: What gives them the confidence to make such conclusive statements? Because behind this promise is the Harmony: The Family's Dreamweavers link up their minds together to construct an unbreakable defensive line.

t_ch: 突破这道防线，在梦境中创造「死亡」…未经家族许可，就连忆者都做不到这事。
t_en: Breaking through this line of defense to create "Death" in the dreamscape... Not even a Memokeeper could do that without The Family's permission.

t_ch: 谁能做到？朋友，只能是她，那个自称巡海游侠的女人…一位冒名顶替的不速之客，隐瞒了真实身份的「令使」……
t_en: Who could have done it? Friend, the only one is her, the girl who calls herself a Galaxy Ranger... An imposter, an unsought guest, an Emanator who hides her true identity...

t_ch: 阿弗利特的死已成定局，而知更鸟…她的惨状就在眼前。下一位牺牲者会是谁？
t_en: Ifrit's death was a foregone conclusion, and Robin... her misfortune was staring right at her. Who will be the next to die?

t_ch: 这实在…让人难以接受。
t_en: This really is... hard to take in.

t_ch: 这只是你的一面之词。
t_en: That's just one side of the story.

t_ch: 既然如此，我不会相信任何人。
t_en: If that's the case, I can't trust anyone.

t_ch: 没事，你可以有自己的判断。培养信任总是需要时间，我愿意等待。
t_en: It's fine. Listen to your gut. Building trust always takes time, and I'm willing to wait.

t_ch: 只是希望你能明白，围绕那份所谓的「遗产」…匹诺康尼暗流涌动，人们个个心怀鬼胎。
t_en: I just hope you realize that wherever that legacy is concerned... covert plans are already underway throughout Penacony. Everyone's got their own agenda.

t_ch: 千万别站错了边。我要是你，就会和黄泉保持距离。毕竟再怎么说，摆上台前的算计，也远胜过藏匿于阴影中的怪物…不是么？
t_en: Careful you don't get stuck on the wrong side. If I were you, I'd keep my distance from Acheron. After all, any schemes out in the open are always going to be better than a monster in the shadows... right?

t_ch: 但谁说明面的算计背后，没有更深的阴谋呢？
t_en: Who's to say there isn't an even deeper conspiracy lurking beneath the surface?

t_ch: …忆者，我想我们的交易早就结束了。
t_en: ...Memokeeper, I think our little deal is finished.

t_ch: （没有忆者的帮助是无法离开这里的…先和黑天鹅聊聊吧。）
t_en: (There's no way outta here without the Memokeeper's help... Let's chat with Black Swan for now.)

t_ch: 来，这边——一小段路，别走丢了。
t_en: Come, this way — it's a short walk. Don't get lost.

t_ch: 砂金说的是实话，这段「记忆」是真实的，没有任何歪曲嫁接的部分。
t_en: Aventurine is telling the truth. This "memory" is a real one, and there's no sign of any distortion grafting on.

t_ch: 公司不是忆庭，能做的事相当有限——这点你再清楚不过。
t_en: The IPC is not the Garden, and there are real limits to what they can actually do. But you know all this.

t_ch: 朋友，不绕弯子了——开门见山地说，<color=#dbc291ff>我想以个人名义同星穹列车达成合作。</color>
t_en: Friend, let's not beat around the bush here — the thing is, <color=#dbc291ff>I want to reach out personally to team up with the Astral Express.</color>

t_ch: 早和你说过，我对遗产争夺战没兴趣，来匹诺康尼只是出于工作。我要替公司收复一些失落的财产，你懂的…就是「边陲监狱」的所有权。
t_en: I told you, I'm just not interested in scrambling for "the Legacy." I just came to Penacony for work. I'm here to retrieve some lost property for the IPC, if you catch my drift... I'm talking ownership of this "frontier prison."

t_ch: 拜{RUBY_B#星核}万界之癌{RUBY_E#}所赐，这东西早成了一笔坏账，公司几次想坐下来谈谈，可家族连门都不给开。
t_en: This has all become a bad debt thanks to the {RUBY_B#Stellaron}Cancer of All Worlds{RUBY_E#}. The IPC has tried sitting down for negotiations time and again, but The Family wouldn't even take our calls.

t_ch: 你不知道这帮人有多难对付。这么说吧，他们以前能瞒下「死亡」的存在，这次也一定能把知更鸟的死讯掩盖过去。
t_en: You have no idea how difficult these people are to deal with. Put it this way — they've hushed up the existence of "Death" before, so they can definitely cover up any news about Robin's death.

t_ch: 就这么悄无声息地化作泡沫消散，到最后也无人知晓……
t_en: It'll just quietly float off like a bubble and pop, nobody ever being the wiser...

t_ch: 这不公平，对不对？所以朋友，我需要你的帮助。
t_en: That's not fair, right? So then, friend, I need your help.

t_ch: 你想要什么帮助？
t_en: What kind of help?

t_ch: 我自有打算。
t_en: I've got something on right now.

t_ch: 没关系，我不会强迫你。
t_en: That's fine. I'm not forcing you.

t_ch: 但我想要的并不多，不妨先听我说完吧，可以么？
t_en: But I'm really not asking for much, so why don't you at least hear me out, okay?

t_ch: 我无法信任你。
t_en: I can't trust you.

t_ch: 没关系，我不会强迫你。
t_en: That's fine. I'm not forcing you.

t_ch: 但我想要的并不多，不妨先听我说完吧，可以么？
t_en: But I'm really not asking for much, so why don't you at least hear me out, okay?

t_ch: 我只有一个目标：家族的大门是堵高墙，要推倒它，我得先凿几个洞出来。一旦出现破绽，公司就有的是手段。
t_en: I have but only one goal: The Family's front door is like a high wall, and to tear the whole thing down I'll have to dig out a few chunks first. Once I find a weak point, the IPC will have plenty of means.

t_ch: 现在，机会来了。只要我们能<color=#dbc291ff>弄清「知更鸟之死」的真相</color>，就能还死者一个公道，同时还能收获谈判的筹码，请家族上桌。
t_en: Now we have our chance. So long as we can <color=#dbc291ff>get to the truth behind her death</color>, we can have justice for Robin while also gaining a valuable bargaining chip for bringing The Family to the table.

t_ch: 千载难逢的机会…我在匹诺康尼四处调查、广交朋友，为的就是这一刻。
t_en: Truly a once-in-a-blue-moon opportunity... I've been investigating and making lots of friends all over Penacony precisely for this very moment.

t_ch: 这个噩耗对家族极其不利，所以他们一定会不遗余力地阻挠外人介入，尤其是公司。
t_en: This tragic news would be extremely bad for The Family, so they'll be doing everything they can to stop it leaking — especially to the IPC.

t_ch: 但我相信也有少数派系是例外，这就是我需要各位的理由。星穹列车名声在外，「同谐」也会给予你们最公正的评价。
t_en: But I trust there are still a few factions that remain exceptions, and that's why I need you all. The reputation of the Astral Express precedes you, and the Harmony will give you the fairest of appraisals.

t_ch: 你们能查明真相、伸张正义，而我能借此完成公司的任务…这就叫双赢。
t_en: You get to find out really what happened and seek justice, and I get to put it toward completing my mission for the IPC... It's what you call a win-win situation.

t_ch: 你要我们利用家族的信任？
t_en: You want to take advantage of The Family's trust in us?

t_ch: 无名客才不会和公司为伍。
t_en: The Nameless would never associate with the IPC.

t_ch: 我一个人没法做主…
t_en: A decision like this is way above my pay grade...

t_ch: 别急嘛，你不妨先回到同伴们身边，和他们聊聊。
t_en: Don't worry. Just head back and talk things over with your companions.

t_ch: 那位领航员小姐是个聪明人，她一定明白这笔交易的价值。喏，我的联系方式，有结论了就联系我。
t_en: That navigator is really smart. She must understand the value of this deal. Look, here's my contact details. If you come to any conclusions, call me.

t_ch: 喔还有…拿去吧！要开展调查，手里总得有点闲钱。千万别客气！
t_en: Oh, and... take this! A thorough investigation can always use a little more funding. Don't mention it!

t_ch: 回见，朋友。我真的非常期待，能和各位一同揭开「死亡」的真相。
t_en: So long, friend. I really am looking forward to uncovering the truth about "Death" with everyone.

t_ch: （砂金自顾自走了…他确实没有强迫的意思，但总感觉不对劲……）
t_en: (Aventurine just sauntered off... He really doesn't mean to force it, but something still seems off...)

t_ch: …接下来呢？你打算怎么做？
t_en: ...What now? What are your plans?

t_ch: （黑天鹅…她又是怎么想的？）
t_en: (Black Swan... What is she thinking?)

t_ch: 表面上看，这场交易对你没有坏处。但砂金是个精明的商人，算盘绝不会只有表面那么简单。
t_en: On the surface, this doesn't look like a bad deal for you. But Aventurine is a shrewd merchant whose scheme won't just be as simple as it appears to be.

t_ch: 他还不知道流萤小姐的事——但从你的反应中，他或许有所察觉，就有意将话题诱导向「死亡的真相」，把你绕进他的逻辑里。
t_en: He doesn't know about Miss Firefly yet — but judging by your reaction, he may have noticed something going on and deliberately shifted topics to the "Truth of Death" to try and pull you in line with his way of thinking.

t_ch: 反应迅速，逻辑清晰…我必须提醒你，和那个男人合作很危险。
t_en: That's quick thinking, and very sound logic. Aventurine is no fool. And working with him definitely has its dangers.

t_ch: 无名客不能对邪恶视而不见。
t_en: The Nameless cannot turn a blind eye to evil.

t_ch: 前提是…真正的「邪恶」。
t_en: But you're talking about REAL evil.

t_ch: 必须给流萤一个交代。
t_en: For Firefly's sake, we must get to the bottom of all this.

t_ch: 这一点…我也赞同。
t_en: That... is something I agree on.

t_ch: 明哲保身是更好的选择。
t_en: Playing it safe seems to be the smarter move.

t_ch: 就眼下的状况而言，确实。但长远来看呢？
t_en: Insofar as things are presently concerned, yes. But what about the long-term?

t_ch: 可以扔个骰子吗？
t_en: Can I toss a die to let it decide for me?

t_ch: 交给命运吗？你的想法倒是与那位赌徒有几分相似了。
t_en: Leaving it up to fate? It's just how that gambler thinks.

t_ch: 无论如何，谨慎些吧。「开拓」的道路不止一条，在群狼环伺的黑暗森林中，你首先要确保自己能够逃出生天。
t_en: Anyway, be careful out there. There's more than one way to blaze a trail. In a dark forest beset by wolves ensuring your own escape to safety should be your primary concern.

t_ch: 至于其他问题……
t_en: As for the other questions...

t_ch: 是「死亡」杀害了知更鸟吗？
t_en: Did "Death" kill Robin?

t_ch: 我不敢肯定两起事件是同一人所为，但那道巨大的伤口…很像它的翼刃，我们都见过它行凶的瞬间。
t_en: I'm not sure the two cases were committed by the same culprit, but that massive wound... looked like its winged blade. We've all witnessed it in action before.

t_ch: 而且…在梦境中致人死地的可能，目前没有第二种。
t_en: Plus... it seems unlikely that there would be two lethal entities loose in the dreamscape.

t_ch: 你认为此事和黄泉有关吗？
t_en: Do you think this is connected to Acheron?

t_ch: 抱歉，我无法回答这个问题。那位游侠太过神秘，恐怕没人能给出定论。
t_en: Sorry, I can't answer that question. That ranger is shrouded in mystery. I'm afraid no one is capable of providing an answer.

t_ch: 但毫无疑问…她是这场宴会中最「特别」的客人。正如砂金方才所说，你最好与她保持距离。
t_en: But without a doubt... she is the most "special" guest at this banquet. It's like Aventurine said just then. It's best to keep your distance from her.

t_ch: 你有注意到其他异常吗？
t_en: Have you noticed anything else unusual?

t_ch: 在极短的时间内先后出现了两位牺牲者…这件事本身就过于异常。
t_en: Two victims appearing one after the other in a very short time span... In and of itself, that's very unusual.

t_ch: 有两种可能：匹诺康尼的梦境崩溃开始加速了，这让「死亡」变得异常躁动，家族的庇护也开始脆弱；又或者，所有的行动都在某个人的计划之中。
t_en: Two possibilities: The collapse of Penacony's Dreamscape has started speeding up, making "Death" extremely agitated and weakening The Family's protections. Or, everything has been planned out and executed by someone.

t_ch: 若是有人刻意而为…先是*偷渡犯*，后是*家族的明星*，凶手的用意难免有些耐人寻味。
t_en: If someone has chosen these victims deliberately... First a stowaway, then a Family celebrity... Then this murderer's motives are worth thoroughly chewing over.

t_ch: 我没有别的问题了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 这一切太突然，我也只能给出猜测。离开这里后，去和你的同伴仔细聊聊吧，希望你们能厘清纷乱思绪的源头。
t_en: It's all happened so quickly I can only make conjecture. After leaving here, go have a chat with your companions. I hope you can clarify the source of this confusion.

t_ch: 从这边离开吧。然后我们就该告别了。这一切就像是…一场噩梦。
t_en: This way... This is where we part ways. All of this is like... a nightmare.

t_ch: 很不幸，记忆不会说谎…我们方才所见，都是真实发生的「现实」，不会因为醒来便消散在脑后。
t_en: Unfortunately, the Remembrance doesn't lie... What we just saw is the "reality" that happened — and it won't fade from our minds just because we wake up.

t_ch: 但不要害怕，听从内心的选择吧。我们都是这样行过世间，留下长短不一的影子，最后…留下珍贵的回忆。
t_en: But follow your heart and don't be afraid. We all walk through this world casting shadows of different lengths, and ultimately... all we leave behind are precious memories.

t_ch: …啊，请再等一下。
t_en: ...Ah, hold on just a sec.

t_ch: 黑天鹅轻抚你的耳根，留下一阵冰凉的触感。随后，她将一张卡片交给了你。
t_en: Black Swan gently touches the root of your ear, leaving a cool sensation. Then, she hands a card over to you.

t_ch: 这样就行了，一件小小的临别礼物。倘若有一日，你不幸沉沦于忆域的深海，又没有忆者相伴——它会代我为你指引出路。
t_en: There you go, a small parting gift. If one day, you unfortunately fall into the deep waters of the Memory Zone and there's no Memokeeper to join you — hopefully it can guide you on my behalf.

t_ch: 我也是很注重人情世故的…就把它当作我对你有所隐瞒的赔礼吧。
t_en: I also pay great attention to the ways of the world... Just think of this as an apology from me for hiding something from you.

t_ch: 谢谢。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 就这？
t_en: That's it?

t_ch: 接下来…我有些私事要处理，是关于那位巡海游侠的。我们就此别过吧。
t_en: Then... I've something private to take care of regarding that Galaxy Ranger. Let's leave things there, shall we?

t_ch: 下次见面时，你又会带来怎样有趣的记忆呢…我很期待哦。
t_en: What fascinating memories will you bring for me next time we meet...? I sincerely look forward to them.

t_ch: （发生了好多事…抓紧时间整理下思绪，等人到齐吧……）
t_en: (So much has happened... I should take a moment to gather my thoughts, and wait for everyone to arrive...)

t_ch: （家族代表…姬子那边没事吧……）
t_en: (A Family rep... Is Himeko okay...)

t_ch: 「…日前，星际和平公司正式宣布——」
t_en: "A few days ago, the IPC made an announcement..."

t_ch: 「茨冈尼亚-Ⅳ在市场开拓部指导下，根据《星际和平宪章》，已建立独立自主的联合酋长国，在星际和平会议上取得合法席位——」
t_en: "Under the watchful guidance of the Marketing Development Department and in accordance with the Interstellar Peace Charter, the independent Sigonian Sovereignty has hereby been established, and shall take a legislative seat at the Interstellar Congress..."

t_ch: 「联合酋长国的建立对茨冈尼亚有着重要历史意义：此举为该星球漫长的血腥历史画上句号，耸人听闻的『卡提卡-埃维金灭绝案件』将成为遥远的过去——」
t_en: "The formation of the Sigonian Sovereignty is of great historical significance to the Sigonia system: This move puts an end to the planet's long and bloody history, turning the sensational Katica-Avgin Extinction Event into a distant memory..."

t_ch: 「茨冈尼亚-Ⅳ位于德涅斯-普鲁阡-多瑙三大星系的交界无主地带，星球表面气候以极端恶劣著称，时刻面临着来自小型天体冲击的威胁——」
t_en: "Sigonia-IV is located in an unclaimed zone at the intersection of the Dnies, Pruthian, and Dorneau star clusters. The planet's surface environment is known for being extremely harsh, constantly faced with the threat of impact from small-scale celestial objects..."

t_ch: 「因此，定居该星球的智慧种族如今已寥寥无几，他们分化成数个氏族，多营游牧，在干旱少雨的荒漠原野中艰难求生，并发展出完全独立于星神体系的民俗信仰……」
t_en: "This is why very few intelligent species have made this planet their home. Dividing themselves into several tribes to eke out nomad lifestyles as they struggle to survive the arid desert wilderness, they have developed their own folk beliefs that are independent of the Aeon belief system..."

t_ch: …茨冈尼亚，茨冈尼亚。焦渴的暴风眼，诸神唾弃之地……
t_en: ...Sigonia, Sigonia. Ravenous eye of the storm, spurned by all the gods...

t_ch: 有石而无水，有雷而无雨，有血而无泪。你用坠星捶打我们，用风雷淬炼我们，用裂土咀嚼我们……
t_en: Land of rock, but not water, lightning, but not rain, blood, but not tears. You beat us with your falling stars, you lash us with wind and storm, you chew us up with the cracked earth...

t_ch: 你赐给我们{RUBY_B#埃维金}蜂蜜{RUBY_E#}之名，却又将我们置于苦涩的{RUBY_B#卡提卡}刀{RUBY_E#}下。{RUBY_B#芬戈-比约斯}三重眼的地母神{RUBY_E#}，如果您能听见，就求您睁眼看看这个孩子……
t_en: You promised us a land of {RUBY_B#Avgin}honey{RUBY_E#}, yet yoked us beneath a {RUBY_B#Katica}sword{RUBY_E#} of bitterness. O, {RUBY_B#Fenge Biyos}Gaiathra Triclops{RUBY_E#}, if Thou can hear me, please open up thy three eyes and gaze upon this child...

t_ch: 当您带走他的父亲，我的孩子尚在羊水中沉睡。而今丈夫所在的地方，我也即将去往……
t_en: When you took his father, my child was still sleeping in my belly. And where my husband went, I too soon must go...

t_ch: 我不求自己走得安详，只愿您能告诉我，在襁褓中熟睡的孩子…他可否梦见母亲的心跳，梦见雨落在大地的声响？求您告诉我，生命是否只是一场转瞬即逝的梦……
t_en: I don't ask for a peaceful death, just for you to tell me — does the baby swaddled sweetly asleep... does he dream of his mother's heartbeat and the sound of falling rain? Please tell me whether this life is all just a fleeting dream...

t_ch: …否则，为何这孩子生来便要迎向死亡…？
t_en: ...Otherwise, why would this child be born to face impending death...?

t_ch: 妈妈…！妈妈…！
t_en: Mommy...! Mommy...!

t_ch: …妈妈——雨！下雨了！
t_en: Mommy...! The rain — it's raining!
Raining...? Raining...

t_ch: 下雨了！是真的！那群外乡人没有骗我们，他们真的唤来了雨…妈妈，我们能离开这里了…我们能回家了…！
t_en: It is raining! It's true! Those outworlders weren't lying to us. They really did summon the rain... Mommy, we can leave here... We can go back home!

t_ch: 回家…啊…三重眼的地母神，是您。您听见了么？谢谢…谢谢……
t_en: Back home... Ahh... Gaiathra Triclops, you came. Do you hear that? Thank you... Thank you...

t_ch: 宝宝，快听…这就是雨的声音。在你出生的那一日，天上也像这样降下{RUBY_B#雨水}母神的恩赐{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: Darling, listen... this is the sound of rain. On the day you were born, the sky also sent down {RUBY_B#Raindrops}a gift{RUBY_E#} like this from Gaiathra.

t_ch: 你是幸运的孩子，被祝福的孩子…就像你的名字一样，是祂赐给埃维金的礼物…我的孩子……
t_en: Such a lucky child, such a blessed child... Just like your name. A gift from THEM to Avgin... my boy...

t_ch: 「愿母神三度为你阖眼……」
t_en: "May the goddess Gaiathra close her eyes three times..."

t_ch: 「令你的血脉永远鼓动……」
t_en: "Keep your blood eternally pulsing..."

t_ch: 「旅途永远坦然……」
t_en: "Let your journey be forever peaceful... "

t_ch: 「…诡计永不败露。」
t_en: "...and your schemes forever concealed."

t_ch: …欢迎来到这个悲伤的世界，{RUBY_B#母神赐福之子}卡卡瓦夏{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: ...Welcome to this sad world, {RUBY_B#Child Blessed by Gaiathra}Kakavasha{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 你该醒了，赌徒。
t_en: Time to wake up, gambler.

t_ch: 天，我可能是苏乐达喝多了…没想到你回来得这么快，如何…有什么发现？
t_en: Oh heavens, I must have drunk too much SoulGlad... Didn't expect you to be back so soon. How is it... find anything?

t_ch: 和你猜的一样：外头没人知道知更鸟遇害了，连一点捕风捉影的流言都没有。电视还在转播她的典礼彩排——大概是个替身吧——人们都在做梦呢。
t_en: Just as you guessed: Nobody outside knows about Robin's death, there aren't even baseless conspiracy theories. They're still streaming the rehearsal for her ceremony — using a stand-in, I guess — *ahem* they must be dreaming.

t_ch: 那是当然。谁能想到死亡会真正降临在家族构建的美梦中呢，遇害者还是「谐乐大典」的女主角……
t_en: Of course. Who could imagine that death would actually descend upon the idyllic dream created by The Family, let alone that the victim would be the female lead of the Charmony Festival...

t_ch: 老实说，我之前不信，甚至亲身*试验*了几次——直到我发现自己确实死不掉。一有危险，我就会被「入梦池」强制唤醒，仿佛只是做了个噩梦。
t_en: To be honest with you, I didn't believe it and even tested it a few times myself — until I discovered that I couldn't actually die. Whenever there's any danger, I'm forced awake by the Dreampool and it's all as if everything were just a nightmare.

t_ch: 所以我才确信，这事背后一定藏着更大的秘密。
t_en: That's why I'm convinced that there are a few big secrets lurking behind the scenes.

t_ch: 那你应该也听说过那只{RUBY_B#「何物朝向死亡」}忆域迷因{RUBY_E#}了——我替你去找橡木家系打点关系的时候，他们正焦头烂额着呢。
t_en: Then you must have heard about the {RUBY_B#"Something Unto Death"}Memory Zone meme{RUBY_E#} — when I graciously deigned to establish connections with the Oak Family on your behalf, they were quite in a pitiful state of disarray.

t_ch: 死者除了知更鸟，还有另一个。具体不清楚，只知道是个偷渡犯。
t_en: Besides Robin, there was another body. I don't know the exact details, just that it was a stowaway.

t_ch: 两起凶杀案？！我就说那无名客的反应不对劲，{M#他}{F#她}一定是撞见另一场了……
t_en: Two murder cases!? I told you, something seemed off about the Nameless. {M#He}{F#She} must have come across the other one...

t_ch: 这凶手真是个疯子…但不得不说，命案是个很好的突破口，可以指控家族渎职，让公司借这个由头介入。
t_en: This murderer is a psycho... but I have to say, the case does represent an opportunity. We can leverage The Family's malfeasance and let the IPC use this as a reason to intervene.

t_ch: 只是他们的手腕比我想象的还要强硬许多，连知更鸟的替身都准备好了…这两起案子一定会被压下去。
t_en: It's just that their trickery runs deeper than I thought. Robin's stand-in was all ready to go... These two murders are definitely getting hushed up.

t_ch: 该怎么做？让我想想…机会难得，不容有失，我得非常小心……
t_en: What should we do? Let me think... It's too rare an opportunity to miss out on, so I gotta be careful...

t_ch: 厉害啊，赌徒。这么快你就又没辙了？
t_en: Incredible, gambler. Have you already exhausted your limited repertoire of tricks so soon?

t_ch: 筹码有很多，但得精挑细选。最直截了当的…还得是知更鸟。记得么，那假面愚者让我*找个哑巴做朋友*。
t_en: There are plenty of chips, but it'd be best to choose carefully. The most straightforward... has to be Robin. Remember? That Masked Fool once told me to find a mute as a friend.

t_ch: 知更鸟就是她口中的「哑巴」。她失声了，一般人注意不到，但逃不过你我的耳朵，那不是器官在发音，而是「同谐」的共振。
t_en: Robin is what she calls the "mute." She has lost her voice and while most people can't pick up on it, you and I cannot mistake that sound — not produced by any voicebox, but rather by the resonance of the Harmony.

t_ch: 如果不是那女孩练歌练到嗓子都哑了，就只有一种可能：家族出了问题，或者是知更鸟自己出了问题。为了弄清这点，我才想尽办法要和她见上一面……
t_en: If that girl hadn't gone hoarse from singing practice, there'd only be one possibility: Something was up with The Family, or Robin herself. To get to the bottom of this, I tried every way I could to meet her...

t_ch: …但她却死了，就死在我的眼皮底下。
t_en: ...but she died, right before my very eyes.

t_ch: 满盘皆输——顺便把你送上了审讯台。
t_en: A complete and utter loss — incidentally, it seems to have resulted in your rather undignified arrival on the interrogation stand.

t_ch: 现场有目击证人，家族姑且相信你的不在场证明，但往后的时间…你恐怕得在猎犬的监视下度过了。
t_en: There were eyewitnesses at the scene, and The Family, in their graciousness, has tentatively accepted your alibi. However, for the foreseeable future... you shall, regrettably, find yourself under the vigilant watch of the Hounds.

t_ch: 现状不容乐观啊，教授，我都开始冒冷汗了。你觉得眼下这局面…还有翻盘的可能么？
t_en: Things aren't looking too optimistic, Doctor. I'm starting to break out in a cold sweat. Do you reckon... there's still any chance of a comeback given how things are?

t_ch: 如果你问我概率——有，但趋近于零——用更符合匹诺康尼本土的说法，做梦。
t_en: A probability? Yes, it exists, but it verges on the infinitesimal. To phrase it in a manner more befitting the vernacular of Penacony, "you're dreaming."

t_ch: 但如果你只是管不住手，想找个人碰碰运气，那正巧有个合适的人选……
t_en: But if you simply can't control yourself and want to try your hand, then there just so happens to be a suitable candidate...

t_ch: 那个男人想再见你一面。
t_en: That man wants to see you again.

t_ch: 谁？
t_en: Who?

t_ch: 星期日。
t_en: Sunday.

t_ch: …是公堂对簿，还是私下受审？
t_en: ...Is this a public hearing, or a private trial?

t_ch: 如果是前者，就不需要我来传话。
t_en: If it were the former, it would hardly befit my stature to stoop to the role of a mere messenger.

t_ch: 好啊…那就对了，全都对了。看吧，死人不会说话，但活人会——
t_en: Fine... That's great. It's all great. You see, the dead can't talk — but the living can...

t_ch: 拉帝奥，我现在可以确信，家族*内部*肯定有问题。等着瞧吧，那男人的妹妹死了…他坐不住的。
t_en: Ratio, I'm convinced now that there must be something wrong inside The Family. Just you wait and see, that man's sister has died. He can't sit on his hands.

t_ch: 事不宜迟，我们这就出发——带路吧！好戏…就要开场咯。
t_en: Without any further ado, let's set off — lead the way! The show... is about to begin.

t_ch: 一段时间前……
t_en: A while ago...

t_ch: …看来胜负早已注定。
t_en: ...It appears the outcome has already been determined.

t_ch: 他们还活着，你也一样。
t_en: They're still alive, as are you.

t_ch: 你还有选择的余地。留下那只八音盒，然后走吧。
t_en: You still have room to make a choice. Leave the music box behind, and then go.

t_ch: 选择？「毁灭」的血途，向来容不下犹疑。
t_en: Choice? The bloody trail of the Destruction leaves no room for hesitation.

t_ch: 陀斐特的火魔…即便你为那位星神献上生命，也得不到祂的垂青。
t_en: Fetora's fire demon... Even if you sacrifice your life for that Aeon, you won't get special treatment.

t_ch: 游侠，你行于狭隘的「巡猎」，自然无法理解。
t_en: Ranger, you tread the narrow Path of The Hunt. You could never understand.

t_ch: 我们从火中来，沐火而生，蔓延、焚烧、破坏，直到薪柴燃尽，留下一地死灰。
t_en: We come from the fire, and are born bathed in fire. We spread, burn, and destroy until all the kindling has burned out, and we leave only ashes on the ground.

t_ch: 燃烧是火魔的一生，起点与终点。我们生而向死，只为贯彻宇宙真理的一种侧写：万物皆为「毁灭」而生。
t_en: Burning forms the entire life of a fire demon, from the beginning to the end. We are born to die, just to put into practice a profile of another universal truth: All things are created for the Destruction.

t_ch: 你的同伴似乎不这么想，他们为你争取了活命的机会。
t_en: Your companions don't seem to think so. They fight for your chance at survival.

t_ch: 他们是我的孩子，同曾经的我一样，是尚未白热的火苗。他们还年轻，我不会责备。
t_en: They are my children and, just as I was, they are flames that have yet to burn white-hot. They're still young and I don't blame them.

t_ch: 但我的火焰已然嘶哑，时间已经不多。看见远方的盛会之星了么？我要将炼狱带往那里——所以在那之前，我必须将你跨越。
t_en: But my flames are faint and time is running out. Can you see the Planet of Festivities in the distance? I plan to bring purgatory with me there — and before that, I must surpass you.

t_ch: 为什么？
t_en: Why?

t_ch: 因为在祂们开辟的道路上，你走得比我更远……
t_en: Because on the path THEY have forged, you have traveled farther than I have...
..."Emanator."

t_ch: 你隐瞒不了自己的身份。拔出那把刀吧，我们诚然会留在这里，我们注定会决一死战，因为我*选择*这么做。
t_en: You cannot hide your true identity. Draw that sword, for we shall indeed remain here, bound to fight a decisive battle to the death, for I choose this.

t_ch: 「毁灭」是壮烈的一瞬。倘若卑劣求存…此生就太过漫长。
t_en: Destruction is intense but brief. To cravenly cling to life is to endure an endlessly prolonged existence.

t_ch: 即便答案…可能是你自身的毁灭？
t_en: Even if the answer... turns out to be your own destruction?

t_ch: 答案并不重要，重要的是它存在，正如你的存在。一切为了被毁灭而存在——令使也不外如是。
t_en: What's important is not the answer, but that it exists — just as you exist. Everything exists to be destroyed — Emanators are no different.

t_ch: 就连虚空之中也能诞下{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼}美梦{RUBY_E#}。所谓的不可能之事，只是尚未到来之事。
t_en: Just as even {RUBY_B#Penacony}sweet dreams{RUBY_E#} may be born of the void, the so-called impossible is merely something that has yet to happen.

t_ch: …好吧，我答应你。
t_en: ...Alright. I accept.

t_ch: 你会见证这世上最为璀璨和暴烈的火。愿这燃烧照亮你深不见底的梦。
t_en: You shall witness the most brilliant and intense fire in existence. May this flame illuminate the farthest reaches of your bottomless dream.

t_ch: 深不见底的梦…的确，但你误会了一件事。
t_en: A bottomless dream... Yes, that's right. But you've made one small mistake.

t_ch: 这把刀仍在鞘中，并非出于怜悯或轻视。它是我不愿示人的秘辛，但作为回敬……
t_en: This blade remains in its scabbard not out of pity or scorn. It's a personal secret that I don't want to disclose, but perhaps out of reciprocity...

t_ch: 在这样说时，她的手也轻轻搭在了刀镡上。
t_en: She says this as her hand gently rests on the hilt of the sword.

t_ch: …我会向你坦诚。
t_en: ...I'll reveal the truth to you.

t_ch: 「巡猎」…并非我所行的道路。
t_en: The Hunt... is not the path I truly follow.

t_ch: 愿死亡结束你漫长的梦……
t_en: May death be the end of your boundless dream...

t_ch: …引领你归还清醒的世界。
t_en: ...guiding you back to the waking world.

t_ch: …「我的时候」？
t_en: ..."My time"?

t_ch: 我见过许多看似高明的伪装，能掩盖外表，但藏不住内心。你也不例外。
t_en: I've seen many clever disguises that can conceal appearances, but they can never cover up who a person really is. And you're no different.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你没想杀死{M#他}{F#她}。你出手只是为了驱散我和那位忆者…为什么？
t_en: You had no desire to kill {NICKNAME}. You only did what you did to drive me and the Memokeeper away... But why?

t_ch: 是「命运的奴隶」让你这么做？
t_en: Did Destiny's Slave make you do it?

t_ch: 你知道艾利欧。
t_en: You know Elio.

t_ch: 我以为这件事会写在你的「剧本」上。
t_en: I thought this is just the kind of thing that'd get written into your "script."

t_ch: 我的「剧本」向来只有几行。除此之外的，不必要，也不需要。
t_en: My "script" has always been brief. Other than that. Anything beyond that is unnecessary.

t_ch: 他知道我的性格：命运只有一种，谁也无法绕开——而在那之前，我有选择的权利。
t_en: He knows my nature: There is but a single destiny, from which no one can escape... And until then, I hold the privilege of choice.

t_ch: 但你似乎不知道，所以该我提问了：你究竟是什么人？
t_en: However, you appear to be ignorant of this, so it's time for me to inquire: Who exactly are you?

t_ch: 也许不是你的敌人。
t_en: Not your enemy, perhaps.

t_ch: 答非所问。
t_en: That's not what I asked.

t_ch: 我不值得你如此好奇。独行银河的人总有些秘密，我也被公司通缉过，对星核猎手有所了解并不奇怪…也仅止于此。
t_en: I don't deserve your curiosity. Loners wandering the cosmos always have their secrets. Take me. I've also been wanted by the IPC, so it's little wonder I know something about the Stellaron Hunters... that's all.

t_ch: 或许我可以帮你。
t_en: Maybe I can help.

t_ch: 你有什么理由这样做？
t_en: What reason would you have for doing that?

t_ch: 我时常会忘记一些事，因此比起回忆，更习惯用「感受」去捕捉些什么。所以——
t_en: I tend to forget things — which is why, rather than memories, I'm accustomed to using my emotions to capture what I normally wouldn't otherwise. So...

t_ch: ——我知道那冰冷的铠甲里是谁。
t_en: ...I know who is inside that cold armor.

t_ch: 怎么样，愿意脱下装甲谈谈了么？
t_en: How about it? Ready to take off that armor and sit down for a talk?

t_ch: 尚不是时候。
t_en: It's not yet time.

t_ch: 我不需要帮助，但可以给你一个建议，这样对你我都更好。
t_en: I don't need help, but I can give you a suggestion that would make things better for you and me.

t_ch: 如果你的目标是「钟表匠的遗产」，就去调查家族。他们不仅掩盖了「死亡」的存在，还埋藏了梦境的过去与真相。
t_en: If your goal is the Watchmaker's Legacy, then go look into The Family. Not only are they covering up the existence of "Death," but they're burying the past and the truth about what happens inside the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 我已经在这么做了。
t_en: Already on it.

t_ch: ——以及，星穹列车不是你的敌人。
t_en: ...and the Astral Express is no enemy of yours.

t_ch: 这我也知道…只是不曾想过会从你口中听闻。
t_en: I know that... I just never expected to hear you say it.

t_ch: 接下来呢？{NICKNAME}被黑天鹅带走了，你要去找{M#他}{F#她}么？
t_en: What's next, then? {NICKNAME}'s been taken by Black Swan. Will you go look for {M#him}{F#her}?

t_ch: 没有那个必要了…告诉你也无妨，艾利欧给我的指示只有一条——「让星穹列车一同追逐『盛大的遗产』」。
t_en: No need for that... No harm in mentioning that Elio's only given me one instruction: "Get all of the Astral Express to track down the grand legacy."

t_ch: 我试过用更简单直接的方式了结此事，但结果如你所见，我正站在这里与你对峙——我失败了。「剧本」无可违逆。
t_en: I tried settling this in an easier and more direct way, but as you can see, here I am, confronting you: I failed. Can't ever go against "the script."

t_ch: 「所谓的不可能之事，只是尚未到来之事」……
t_en: "The so-called impossible is merely something that has yet to happen"...

t_ch: …罢了。在分别前，我可以再问你一个问题么？
t_en: ...That's it. Before we split, can I ask you one more thing?

t_ch: 你的「剧本」中有任何关于我的部分吗？我想知道，在命运所见的未来中，<color=#ff3a3e>「我」</color>留下了怎样的注脚？
t_en: Is there anything else in your "script" about me? I'd like to know what kind of footnote <color=#ff3a3e>"I"</color> get to leave in that future foreseen by destiny?

t_ch: 很遗憾，只字未提。
t_en: Unfortunately, not a thing came up.

t_ch: …并不意外。
t_en: ...I knew it.

t_ch: 等等——
t_en: Hang on...

t_ch: 我不会。
t_en: I don't.

t_ch: 什么？
t_en: Don't what?

t_ch: 你最初的提问——「你是否还会做梦，梦见那些因你而死的人。」
t_en: Your first question was: "Do you still have dreams about everyone who died because of you?"

t_ch: 我不会。从来不会。
t_en: I don't. Never have.

t_ch: 我生来便没有「做梦」的机能。我为冰冷的现实而活，为一点光亮，燃烧…不断燃烧，直到化作死灰。
t_en: I was born without the ability to "dream." I live for this cold harsh reality, for a little light, and to burn... to keep on burning, until I turn to ash.

t_ch: 所以，我很羡慕你。
t_en: So, I really envy you.

t_ch: 是么……
t_en: Is that so...

t_ch: 那你已经活在清醒的世界中了。
t_en: Then you're already living in the waking world.

t_ch: 黑天鹅引领你穿过了混乱的梦境……
t_en: Black Swan leads you through the chaotic Dreamscape...

t_ch: 一段时间前 忆域深处
t_en: Some time ago — Deep in Memory Zone

t_ch: 数日前 永火官邸
t_en: Days ago — Ever-Flame Mansion

t_ch: 现在 黄金的时刻
t_en: Present day — Golden Hour

t_ch: 同一时间 现实中的酒店
t_en: At the same time — Hotel in the real world

t_ch: 与此同时，另一边……
t_en: At this moment, on the other side...

t_ch: 二人原路返回……
t_en: The two return on the path they came from...

t_ch: 二人返回大厅……
t_en: The two return to the lobby...

t_ch: 欢迎来到「黄金的时刻」基底模型。
t_en: Welcome to the Golden Hour base model.

t_ch: 乐意为您效劳。
t_en: Happy to be of service.

t_ch: 你好，我是「橡木兵人」。
t_en: Hello, I am an Oak Family Soldier.

t_ch: 你好，我是NPC。
t_en: Hello, I am an NPC.

t_ch: 你好，我是工业化的渣滓。
t_en: Hello, I'm industrial scum.

t_ch: 你好，我是工业化的骄傲。
t_en: Hello, I'm industrial pride.

t_ch: 你好，我需要五星好评。
t_en: Hello, I need a five-star review.

t_ch: 你好，你不能通过这里。
t_en: Hello, you can't pass through here.

t_ch: 你好，我是世界上最烂的兵人。
t_en: Hello, I'm the world's lousiest soldier.

t_ch: 你好，我是是是是——
t_en: Hello, I a—a—a—am...

t_ch: 你你你你你你好。
t_en: H—H—H—H—Hello.

t_ch: 锟斤拷锟斤拷锟斤拷。
t_en: Jistgabburash.

t_ch: 烫烫烫烫烫烫烫。
t_en: Hothothothothothothot.

t_ch: 数系统时前 朝露公馆
t_en: System hours ago — Dewlight Pavilion

t_ch: 真没看到？再好好想想。
t_en: You really didn't see anything? Think harder.

t_ch: 我…我这几天都在摸鱼…
t_en: I... I've been slacking off at work these few days...

t_ch: 阵仗怎么这么大？
t_en: Why is it so big?

t_ch: 难道偷渡犯的事是真的…
t_en: Could the stowaway incident be real...

t_ch: 案侦工作需要，敬请谅解。
t_en: It's detective work. Please understand.

t_ch: 你和这位猎犬家系成员打过交道，知道他非常有原则。但你很清楚，人在<color=#dbc291ff>心情好</color>的时候原则是不太管用的。
t_en: You and this Bloodhound Family member have met before, and you know he's very upright. But you're also aware that principles sometimes don't matter when a person is in a <color=#dbc291ff>good mood</color>.

t_ch: 有原则的猎犬家系成员陷入了无尽的悲伤。作为补偿，你得想办法<color=#dbc291ff>安慰</color>一下他。
t_en: The principled Bloodhound Family member is mired in endless sorrow. As compensation, you have to think of a way to <color=#dbc291ff>comfort</color> him.

t_ch: 有原则的猎犬家系成员变得异常沉重…还是想办法让他<color=#dbc291ff>轻松</color>一点吧。
t_en: The principled Bloodhound Family member has become unusually gloomy... You have to think of a way to get him to <color=#dbc291ff>lighten up</color>.

t_ch: 与此同时，另一边……
t_en: At this moment, on the other side...

t_ch: 现在还不是做这个的时候——四下分发宝石，打听偷渡犯的线索，然后看看*那位女孩*会不会上钩吧。
t_en: It's not yet time to do this now — give out the gems and get some clues on the stowaway, then see if *that girl* will take the bait.

t_ch: 流萤小姐的事，我们从黑天鹅口中听说了…可没想到，连知更鸟小姐也……
t_en: We heard about Miss Firefly from Black Swan... But we never expected Miss Robin to...

t_ch: 抱歉…那时没能陪在你身旁。
t_en: I'm sorry... that I couldn't be with you then.

t_ch: 现实中风平浪静，梦境里却暗流涌动，真是应了那位忆者的话啊……
t_en: Reality cruises on in serenity, while undercurrents bubble up from the Dreamscape... just like that Memokeeper said...

t_ch: 各位，尚不是消沉的时候，我们还能为她们做些力所能及的事，比如…找出凶手。
t_en: ...Stay strong, everyone. We can still do what we can for them... starting with finding the murderer.

t_ch: 整理下现状吧，{NICKNAME}的话让我想起一些事。小三月，还记得和我们交涉的那位家族代表是怎么说的吗？
t_en: Let's recap everything then. {NICKNAME} just reminded me of something: March, do you remember what that Family rep who negotiated with us said?

t_ch: 「诚然，我们相信无名客与此事无关，也恳请各位能协助家族一道，查明死者的身份。」是这么说的…指的是流萤小姐。
t_en: "Indeed, we trust that the Nameless has nothing to do with this, and we also beg each of you to help assist The Family in verifying the identity of the deceased." That's how it was put... in reference to Miss Firefly.

t_ch: 现在回想起来，他当时的神情有些躲闪，对理应更早发生的另一起事件也闭口不提。
t_en: Looking back, he seemed a little evasive at the time. And he also failed to mention anything about the earlier murder, too.

t_ch: 家族是打算隐瞒知更鸟小姐的死讯吧，这件事要是传开，匹诺康尼就真要「血流成河」了……
t_en: The Family is planning on covering up all news about Miss Robin's death. If news gets out, Penacony is going to turn into a bloodbath...

t_ch: 但紧随其后的第二起事件，显然超出了他们的预料，以致家族不得不顺势而为，向外来者求援。谐乐大典在即，他们一定分身乏术了。
t_en: But the murder that followed closely after was obviously beyond their anticipation. The Family had to try and turn things to their advantage by bringing in reinforcements from outside. The Charmony Festival is nearly here — they must be snowed under.

t_ch: 也可能是因为流萤小姐一事目击者众多，不方便掩盖，不如顺水推舟，让更多人入场控制局势。
t_en: It may also be that Miss Firefly's murder had so many witnesses that it couldn't be covered up, so they went with the flow and let more people on the scene to control the situation.

t_ch: 毕竟两起案件的性质有根本不同…家族首要提防的，还是那些不怀好意的来客，比如那位公司的使节。
t_en: After all, the nature of the two murders is fundamentally different... The Family's first protective measures should be against malicious actors among the guests, such as that IPC envoy.

t_ch: 他确实不怀好意。
t_en: He really is up to no good.

t_ch: 同时，他还指控了那位「巡海游侠」……
t_en: All the while accusing that Galaxy Ranger...

t_ch: 砂金却在提防黄泉。
t_en: Aventurine is on guard against Acheron.

t_ch: 的确，他对那位「巡海游侠」尤为关注。
t_en: Indeed, he was particularly concerned about that Galaxy Ranger.

t_ch: 什么螳螂捕蝉黄雀在后啊…但总感觉砂金指控黄泉小姐的理由也很微妙，该相信他说的话吗？
t_en: Are we missing the forest for the trees here...? I always felt that Aventurine's reasons for accusing Miss Acheron were highly subtle. Can we believe him?

t_ch: 事到如今，我们能信任的恐怕只有自己了。
t_en: At this point, I'm afraid the only ones we can trust are ourselves.

t_ch: 总之，先试着搜集信息，罗列尽量多的可能性吧。再逐一将其中的矛盾排除，剩下的事实越少，便越有可能是真相。
t_en: Look, let's try to gather intel first and then list all the possible outcomes we can. Then we go through them, eliminating contradictions one-by-one. The fewer facts remaining, the closer we are to the truth.

t_ch: 但我总有种预感…即便发生了这么多事，我们依然在有关<color=#dbc291ff>「遗产」</color>的漩涡中打转……
t_en: ...I've still got this sense of foreboding. It's like we're stuck in a whirlpool — spinning around <color=#dbc291ff>that Legacy</color> even after everything that's happened...

t_ch: （看来砂金对这个结果很满意…和大家说一声吧。）
t_en: (Looks like Aventurine is happy with this outcome... Let's tell everyone about it.)

t_ch: 这次我们要实打实扮演一次大侦探了…但在调查开始前，该怎么答复家族和砂金？
t_en: This time we're playing the role of a real detective... But before we start, what are we going to say to The Family and Aventurine?

t_ch: 在我看来，家族对星穹列车并无恶意——若非信任列车组的品格，他们不会轻易委托外人调查一桩堪称「丑闻」的案件。
t_en: As I see things, The Family harbors no ill-will towards the Astral Express — if they didn't trust the Crew, they wouldn't have casually commissioned outsiders to investigate a case that's in all likelihood "a scandal."

t_ch: 况且这是家族的地界，与他们合作，应当能为后续的事行不少方便。
t_en: Plus, this is The Family's turf. Teaming up with them should make things easier for us in the future.

t_ch: 至于砂金那边…瓦尔特，我想听听你的看法。
t_en: As for that Aventurine... Welt, I'd like to hear your thoughts.

t_ch: 这人不简单，他在和{NICKNAME}交涉的过程中故意放低姿态，话里话外却一直在围追堵截……
t_en: He's complex. He deliberately slow-played his hand during negotiations while running circles round us all the while.

t_ch: 于情于理，他都给出了令人信服的说法。说是不勉强，但意图已经很明显了。
t_en: He appealed convincingly to both reason and emotion. It wasn't forced, but the intent was obvious.

t_ch: 不过在局势尚不明朗的当下，建立更多联系不是坏事。砂金三言两语便展现了自己的手腕，只要利益一致，他也能成为可靠的盟友。
t_en: Still, it's good to have contacts among all this uncertainty. Aventurine showed his skills, and as far as our interests are aligned, he can become a reliable ally.

t_ch: 我们也得谨慎处理和家族的距离，切不可走得太近。与公司合作不失为一种制衡的方法，一旦任何一方另有企图，我们都有机会抽身。
t_en: We also need to keep a certain distance from The Family — never let them get too close. Teaming up with the IPC helps balance that out — if either side makes a move, we have the option to pull out.

t_ch: 所以你建议先接受砂金的合作提议。
t_en: So you suggest accepting Aventurine's proposal to team up?

t_ch: 是。隐患固然存在…但也只能等各方心思明了后，再做进一步判断了。
t_en: Yes... It's risky, but we can only wait until both sides have played their cards before making any further judgments.

t_ch: 道理我都明白，可这里坏女人坏男人太多，真的好担心被背刺啊。{NICKNAME}都遭人欺负几回了，我实在看不下去……
t_en: I get why, but there's a whole lot of bad guys and girls around here and I'm worried about getting stabbed in the back. {NICKNAME} has been bullied a few times now, and I can't stand it anymore...

t_ch: 没事，以大局为重。
t_en: It's fine. Let's focus on the big picture for now.

t_ch: 哎，你这车轱辘话说了跟没说似的……
t_en: You're like a broken record...

t_ch: 没事，他给的很多…
t_en: It's fine. I got a lot out of him, too...
You...

t_ch: …不行！本姑娘可不能接受这种理由！
t_en: ...No! I can't accept this!

t_ch: 没事，尽管欺负我吧！
t_en: It's cool. You can bully me whenever!
You...

t_ch: …不行！本姑娘可不能接受这种理由！
t_en: ...No! I can't accept this!

t_ch: …算了，还是让本姑娘紧盯他吧！实在不行，咱们就反过来利用他呗。
t_en: ...Forget about it. Just let me keep an eye on him! If that doesn't work, we can just turn the tables and use him instead!

t_ch: 那就麻烦{NICKNAME}给砂金一个答复吧。各位也趁这段时间，再整理下思绪。
t_en: Then {NICKNAME}, could you please reply to Aventurine? Everyone, take this time to put together your thoughts.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼大剧院依旧静静悬浮于梦海中央。
t_en: Penacony Grand Theater still silently floats in the heart of the sea of dreams.

t_ch: 《谐乐颂》周而复始，人们依旧各行其道，全然不知无人在意的角落中，已有两条生命化作梦泡消散。
t_en: Odes of Harmony plays on, as people continue their journeys, oblivious to the unnoticed corners where two lives have already dissolved into fleeting dreams.

t_ch: 钟表小子的笑容始终灿烂——不知他的目光是否能够遍及美梦中每一处无光的角落？
t_en: Clockie's smile forever radiant — It's not yet known if his gaze can reach every dark corner in the realm of dreams.

t_ch: 中央黄金车站人流如织。形如弹珠的「球笼」安稳地锁住每一颗灵魂，再将它们送往梦境各地。
t_en: The Central Golden Station teems with a flowing crowd. Like bouncing marbles, the Spheroids securely captures every soul and transports them to dreamscapes afar.

t_ch: 你记得，这是你和流萤初次相遇的地方。
t_en: The place where you and Firefly first met.

t_ch: 艾迪恩公园的空气甜如蜂蜜——这是苏乐达糖浆特有的味道。
t_en: Aideen Park's air is sweet as honey — a scent unique of the SoulGlad syrup.

t_ch: 如果人们能像钟表小子一样，从苏乐达瓶中的汽水里获得解决一切难题的力量，无辜的生命是否就能逃离「死亡」？
t_en: If people could, like Clockie, find the power to solve all problems in the soda from the SoulGlad bottle, would innocent lives be able to escape "Death"?

t_ch: 不知道是不是太突然了，我总觉得…知更鸟小姐没有死，还好好地活在什么地方。一切就只是场…恶作剧……
t_en: I hope it's not too soon to bring it up, but I feel like... Miss Robin isn't actually dead, but that she's still alive and well somewhere. That everything's just some... horrible prank...

t_ch: 因为…这不是在梦里吗？美梦乐园怎么会有人死掉呢，不应该只有好事发生…才对吗？
t_en: Because... aren't we supposed to be inside a dream? How could someone die in a beautiful dreamscape like this... Shouldn't only good things happen here?

t_ch: 唉，看到那座大剧院，就会忍不住胡思乱想……
t_en: Whenever I see the grand theater, I just can't stop all these thoughts from flooding my head...

t_ch: 你在怀疑家族吗？
t_en: Do you think The Family is behind all this?

t_ch: 不不不，没有——毕竟有了他们才有了如今为所有人带来笑容的美梦嘛。只是，我感觉自己开始有点看不透他们了……
t_en: No no, after all they've brought everyone this sleepy dreamscape which everyone loves. I just feel like I'm starting to understand them less and less...

t_ch: 我们会让美梦恢复正常的。
t_en: We'll restore all the dreams back to normal.

t_ch: 嗯！当然啦，这种时候还得看我们列车组——家族、公司，一个个都只打自己的算盘……
t_en: Yeah! Of course, at times like this we're so lucky to have our Crew. The Family and the IPC — everyone has their own plans going on...

t_ch: 街上的人们依旧好开心，没人知道发生了什么…好不真实，就好像流萤和知更鸟小姐，还有我们…是另一个世界的人。
t_en: Everyone's still having a great time out there on the streets. Nobody knows what's happened... It's all so unreal, as if Firefly, Miss Robin, and us... were all outsiders from another world.

t_ch: 啊…好烦！好想喝点冰冰凉凉的汽水冷静冷静……
t_en: Ahh... what a mess! I really want a nice cool drink of soda to help me calm down...

t_ch: 但这不就跟街上的人一样了吗…唔……
t_en: But then I'd be just like everyone else out on the streets...

t_ch: 这片美梦…越来越不真实了啊。
t_en: This dream... is becoming more and more separated from reality.

t_ch: 砂金的话里，还有一点让我很在意。
t_en: Aventurine said something that concerns me...

t_ch: 在没有任何证据的情况下，他直接指控那位巡海游侠是杀死知更鸟的嫌犯。可对于她和「忆域迷因」的联系，以及为何要潜伏在你身边，却只字未提。
t_en: He accused that Galaxy Ranger of killing Robin without any evidence whatsoever... but said nothing about her connection to that Memory Zone Meme, or why he was stalking you.

t_ch: 这种明显站不住脚的推论…对获取你的信任毫无帮助，只会让他显得更可疑。
t_en: It was a groundless accusation... which only serves to make him seem more suspicious.

t_ch: 究竟是为什么呢…
t_en: But why, though...?

t_ch: 砂金有别的打算？
t_en: Does Aventurine have other plans?

t_ch: 他在虚张声势。
t_en: He's bluffing.

t_ch: 或许，砂金的目的从一开始就不是博取信任，而是让你对黄泉心生芥蒂。这样会让局势更加混乱，是他乐见的结果。
t_en: Maybe Aventurine's goal was never to gain our trust. Maybe he wanted to foster a feeling of enmity toward Acheron and make the situation more volatile... Two birds, one stone.

t_ch: 不过，前来赴约的泯灭帮失去音讯一事，我向留守列车的丹恒求证了…不是砂金凭空编造。
t_en: However, I asked Dan Heng back on the Express to confirm that story about the Annihilation Gang and the lost messages... It wasn't something that Aventurine made up out of thin air.

t_ch: 接触过这么多次，你对黄泉小姐的印象如何？
t_en: You've met her many times, now. What's your impression of Miss Acheron?

t_ch: …是个很温和的人？
t_en: ...She's a very gentle woman?

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>奇怪…我好像记不清了。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Weird... I can't seem to remember.</color>

t_ch: …是个很神秘的人？
t_en: ...She's a very mysterious woman?

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>奇怪…我好像记不清了。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Weird... I can't seem to remember.</color>

t_ch: …是个很厉害的人？
t_en: ...She's a very powerful woman?

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>奇怪…我好像记不清了。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Weird... I can't seem to remember.</color>

t_ch: 奇怪…我好像记不清了。
t_en: Weird... I can't seem to remember.

t_ch: …倒是很符合巡海游侠给人的刻板印象。
t_en: ...That fits the stereotype of a Galaxy Ranger to a T.

t_ch: 这群人…千奇百怪，捉摸不透，又喜欢独来独往。哎，也难怪会被怀疑啊。
t_en: They're eccentric, unpredictable, and fond of being alone. No wonder she's a suspect.

t_ch: 无论如何，不要完全信任砂金。我们绝不能被他牵着鼻子走。
t_en: Whatever happens, please don't place all your trust in Aventurine. We cannot afford to be manipulated by him.

t_ch: 砂金的目标是为公司收复匹诺康尼。为此，他必须扳倒家族，制造出足够大的破绽。
t_en: Aventurine's goal is to try and recapture Penacony for IPC. To do this, he'll have to bring down The Family in its entirety to create a big enough chance.
